category_sources: source_facts.description identifies GUPnP as a framework for creating UPnP devices and control points; official gi-docgen docs describe it as a UPnP implementation using GObject.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gupnp; official gi-docgen documentation heading is GUPnP.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Pages gi-docgen site provides GUPnP API documentation and links the source project.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME GitLab repository; official gi-docgen docs list the same source URL; source_facts.repo is empty so repo was enriched.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies UPnP framework behavior; official docs list GObject, GLib, Soup, and GSSDP dependencies.
